# SCIT Consulting — Full Company Profile

> AI-first digital transformation consultancy based in Estonia, serving businesses across Europe.

## Company Overview

SCIT Consulting is a boutique digital transformation consultancy specializing in helping businesses leverage artificial intelligence to automate processes, build intelligent systems, and transform their operations. Founded in Estonia, we serve clients across European markets.

Our team brings 15+ years of hands-on experience in executive consulting and organizational transformation. We have worked across multiple European markets including Portugal, Germany, Spain, and Czech Republic — in cities like Lisbon, Munich, Düsseldorf, Madrid, and Prague.

With over 35 projects delivered across industries such as IT & Technology, Financial Services, Retail & E-commerce, Manufacturing, Healthcare, and Telecommunications, we bring real-world expertise in AI agents, automation systems, conversational AI, and strategic consulting.

## Services

### AI Automation & Process Automation
Identify and automate repetitive business processes using AI. We build intelligent workflows that reduce manual effort, minimize errors, and free your team to focus on high-value work.

### Custom AI Agents
Purpose-built AI agents that work alongside your team. From lead qualification to customer support, our agents handle complex tasks autonomously while learning from your business context.

### Chatbots & Conversational AI
Intelligent conversational interfaces for customer support, sales, and internal operations. Multi-language support with natural language understanding.

### AI Tools Implementation
Strategic selection and deployment of AI tools across your organization. We evaluate, integrate, and optimize tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and open-source models for your specific workflows.

### AI Strategy & Consulting
Comprehensive AI readiness assessments, roadmap development, and strategic planning. We help leadership teams understand where AI creates the most value and build a practical path to implementation.

### Digital Transformation
End-to-end transformation programs that modernize operations, digitize workflows, and embed AI across your organization. From legacy systems to AI-native operations.

## Case Studies

### Multi-Location Physiotherapy Clinic Chain (Healthcare)
Challenge: Patient scheduling inefficiencies, high no-show rates, fragmented communication across clinics.
Results: 42% no-show reduction, 25 hours/week staff time saved, 94% patient satisfaction, 3x faster booking.

### Leading Luxury Elderly Care Provider (Healthcare)
Challenge: Modernize operations without compromising personalized, high-touch service.
Results: 60% documentation time reduction, 85% family engagement increase, 97% care quality score, 35% staff retention improvement.

### European B2B Services Company (B2B Services)
Challenge: Slow response times, inconsistent proposal quality, 70% of sales time on admin tasks.
Results: 75% proposal time reduction, 28% win rate increase, 40% revenue growth, 80% faster lead response.

### Real Estate Management Portfolio (Real Estate)
Challenge: Tenant communication delays, maintenance request backlogs, manual document management.
Results: 90% response time reduction, 30% maintenance cost decrease, 88% tenant satisfaction, 65% requests automated.

### Medical Clinic Network (Healthcare)
Challenge: Implement AI tools across clinic network without disrupting workflows or compromising data privacy.
Results: 45% operational efficiency improvement, 98% documentation accuracy, €250K annual cost savings, 92% staff AI adoption.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What industries does SCIT Consulting serve?
A: We primarily serve Healthcare, Financial Services, Retail & E-Commerce, and B2B Services, though our AI solutions are applicable across many industries.

Q: Where is SCIT Consulting based?
A: We are based in Tallinn, Estonia, and serve clients across Europe.

Q: What AI models do you work with?
A: We work with all major AI models including Claude (Anthropic), GPT (OpenAI), Gemini (Google), and various open-source models. We choose the best fit for each project.

Q: How long does a typical AI implementation take?
A: Depending on scope, projects range from 4-6 weeks for focused automation to 3-6 months for comprehensive digital transformation programs.

Q: Do you offer AI strategy consulting without implementation?
A: Yes. We offer standalone AI readiness assessments and strategy consulting to help businesses understand their AI opportunities before committing to implementation.

## Values

- Impact Over Hype: Real business outcomes, not trendy tech demos.
- Quality Over Speed: Solutions that work reliably and scale sustainably.
- Partnership Over Projects: Long-term relationships, not one-off engagements.
- Transparency Over Promises: Honest communication about what AI can and cannot do.
